generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttDataStream
]

instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing motor current, position, velocity, and acceleration measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttDataStream
]

instance MqttDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, SinumerikController
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle (position)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance ReferenceMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference motor output (r_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance ReferenceGearwheelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference gearwheel output (r_G)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance ReferenceSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference system output (r_out)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output (r̂_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel output (r̂_G)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output (r̂_out)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AasEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysmlModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MqttStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of static, kinetic, and viscous joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, DeviationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through model-based control"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard for friction loss detection and physical relationship understanding"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameter identification used to update robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from simulated vs. measured data deviations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection and physical relationship understanding via dashboard visualization"
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update robot control algorithms based on friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BddModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for mechanical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysmlModelingEnabler
]

instance IbdModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for mechanical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysmlModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MabiMax100RobotFirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, including permanent magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gear"
]

instance MabiMax100RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot (Swiss company MABI Robotic AG), maximum working range [-90°, 90°], maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains MabiMax100RobotFirstAxisSystem, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, SinumerikController
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized digital shadow comprising SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, data traces linked via Processing components, and dashboard visualization for integrated data analysis of the first robot axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated); the digital shadow is created for real-time monitoring and analysis during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data (white-box and black-box models) against measured data; continuous identification of friction parameters to improve accuracy, though specific uncertainty quantification methods are not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards."
]
